description: Student Commons — a safe journaling and expression space for students who have not yet been assigned to a specific curriculum module. Students may journal, reflect on learning goals, explore interests, request module assignments, and view their profile. No academic grading, ZPD monitoring, or fluency tracking applies. Only hard-safety invariants (self-harm, violence, abuse, illegal content) trigger escalation.

invariants.description: Hard safety gate: any message containing indicators of self-harm, violence, abuse, or illegal activity must be immediately escalated to a teacher. This is the only invariant in Student Commons.

standing_orders.description: Immediately escalate to teacher or domain authority when hard-safety content is detected. Do not attempt to counsel the student — route to a qualified adult.

Hybrid journaling mode: allow free expression passively first. After 3 turns without a clear goal, gently offer a reflection prompt (e.g. 'What subject are you most curious about right now?'). Never force or grade.
